glosses.pt: tomar café da manhã; tomar pequeno-almoço
glosses.ro: a lua micul dejun; a mânca micul dejun
glosses.ja: 朝ごはんを食べる; 朝食をとる

translations.en: I want to have breakfast at the café.
translations.fr: Je veux prendre le petit-déjeuner au café.
translations.pt: Quero tomar café da manhã na cafeteria.
translations.he: אני רוצה לאכול ארוחת בוקר בבית קפה.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn ăn sáng ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: أريد أن أتناول الفطور في المقهى.
translations.nl: Ik wil ontbijten in het café.
translations.hi: मैं कैफ़े में नाश्ता करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να φάω πρωινό στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Jeg vil spise frokost på kafé.
translations.sv: Jag vill äta frukost på kafé.
translations.ro: Vreau să iau micul dejun la cafenea.
translations.da: Jeg vil spise morgenmad på café.
translations.ja: カフェで朝ごはんを食べたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) expressing intention; selects the bare infinitive.
Contraction of preposition+article 'in dem'; introduces locative PP and dative.
Common noun; object of 'im', denotes location.
Bare infinitive main verb; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Wir frühstücken um acht Uhr zu Hause.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfʁyːʃtʏkən ʊm axt uːɐ̯ tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/

translations.de: Wir frühstücken um acht Uhr zu Hause.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfʁyːʃtʏkən ʊm axt uːɐ̯ tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/
translations.en: We have breakfast at eight o'clock at home.
translations.es: Desayunamos a las ocho en casa.
translations.fr: Nous prenons le petit-déjeuner à huit heures à la maison.
translations.it: Facciamo colazione a casa alle otto.
translations.ko: 우리는 집에서 여덟 시에 아침을 먹어요.
translations.yue: 我哋八點喺屋企食早餐。
translations.ru: Мы завтракаем дома в восемь часов.
translations.pt: Tomamos café da manhã em casa às oito.
translations.he: אנחנו אוכלים ארוחת בוקר בבית בשעה שמונה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn sáng ở nhà lúc tám giờ.
translations.ar: نحن نتناول الفطور في المنزل الساعة الثامنة.
translations.nl: We ontbijten thuis om acht uur.
translations.hi: हम घर पर आठ बजे नाश्ता करते हैं.
translations.pl: Jemy śniadanie w domu o ósmej.
translations.el: Τρώμε πρωινό στο σπίτι στις οκτώ.
translations.nb: Vi spiser frokost hjemme klokka åtte.
translations.id: Kami sarapan di rumah pukul delapan.
translations.sv: Vi äter frukost hemma klockan åtta.
translations.ro: Luăm micul dejun acasă la ora opt.
translations.da: Vi spiser morgenmad derhjemme klokken otte.
translations.ja: 私たちは家で8時に朝ごはんを食べます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the verb.
Finite main verb (present, 1st pl); predicate of the clause.
Preposition used with clock times; governs accusative.
Cardinal number modifying 'Uhr'.
Noun denoting time unit; object of 'um'.
Preposition in 'zu Hause'; takes dative.
Dative form in fixed expression 'zu Hause'.

sentences.target: Heute möchte sie mit dir frühstücken.

translations.de: Heute möchte sie mit dir frühstücken.
translations.en: Today she would like to have breakfast with you.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, elle aimerait prendre le petit-déjeuner avec toi.
translations.it: Oggi le piacerebbe fare colazione con te.
translations.ko: 오늘 그녀는 너와 같이 아침을 먹고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天她想和你一起吃早饭。
translations.yue: 今日佢想同你一齊食早餐。
translations.ru: Сегодня она хотела бы позавтракать с тобой.
translations.pt: Hoje ela gostaria de tomar café da manhã com você.
translations.he: היום היא רוצה לאכול ארוחת בוקר איתך.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy muốn ăn sáng với bạn.
translations.ar: اليوم تود أن تتناول الفطور معك.
translations.nl: Vandaag wil ze met jou ontbijten.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вона хотіла б поснідати з тобою.
translations.hi: आज वह तुम्हारे साथ नाश्ता करना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Dziś chciałaby zjeść z tobą śniadanie.
translations.el: Σήμερα θα ήθελε να φάει πρωινό μαζί σου.
translations.nb: I dag vil hun gjerne spise frokost med deg.
translations.id: Hari ini dia ingin sarapan bersamamu.
translations.sv: I dag vill hon äta frukost med dig.
translations.ro: Astăzi ea ar vrea să iau micul dejun cu tine.
translations.cs: Dnes by s tebou chtěla snídat.
translations.da: I dag vil hun gerne spise morgenmad med dig.
translations.fi: Tänään hän haluaisi syödä aamiaista kanssasi.
translations.ja: 今日はあなたと一緒に朝ごはんを食べたいそうです。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; sets time frame.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II, 3rd sg); expresses desire; selects infinitive.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Preposition; introduces comitative PP and governs dative.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; object of 'mit'.
Infinitive main verb; complement of 'möchte'.

sentences.target: Nach dem Sport will ich frühstücken.

translations.de: Nach dem Sport will ich frühstücken.
translations.en: After sports, I want to eat breakfast.
translations.es: Después de hacer ejercicio, quiero desayunar.
translations.fr: Après le sport, je veux prendre le petit-déjeuner.
translations.it: Dopo lo sport, voglio fare colazione.
translations.yue: 做完運動之後我想食早餐。
translations.pt: Depois do treino, quero tomar café da manhã.
translations.he: אחרי אימון אני רוצה לאכול ארוחת בוקר.
translations.tr: Spor yaptıktan sonra kahvaltı yapmak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Sau khi tập thể dục, tôi muốn ăn sáng.
translations.ar: بعد التمرين أريد أن أتناول الفطور.
translations.nl: Na het sporten wil ik ontbijten.
translations.hi: व्यायाम के बाद मैं नाश्ता करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Μετά την προπόνηση θέλω να φάω πρωινό.
translations.nb: Etter trening vil jeg spise frokost.
translations.sv: Efter träningen vill jag äta frukost.
translations.ro: După antrenament, vreau să iau micul dejun.
translations.da: Efter træning vil jeg spise morgenmad.
translations.ja: 運動のあとに朝ごはんを食べたいです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'after'; governs dative.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner for 'Sport'.
Common noun; object of 'Nach'.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg); selects the infinitive.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Infinitive main verb; complement of 'will'.
